blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: He said that. Said he was carrying something. Didn't say what.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Julian, people say things like that.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Cade came out after. Marcus looked at him and said you don't look so well. Cade said drop it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Friends push back on each other. That's not a case.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Say it like you mean it.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Marcus said Nadia had a rough couple of years. The quiet kind.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: A lot of people have rough years.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: He's protective of her. Has been for a long time.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: That's called being a good friend.

options.label: He sits down and eats. He lets it go.
He sits down. But he doesn't let it go.
